title: dortmanna triquetra
intro: Dortmanna triquetra, also known as Triquetrum or Three-angled, is a perennial plant native to Europe, characterized by its distinctive three-angled leaves and blue or white flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Dortmanna triquetra include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve pain, and calm the nervous system, making it a popular remedy for digestive issues and anxiety. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
